entities.name: reflection-synthesizer
entities.context: CLI tool that generates synthesis after strategic partner sessions, can re-synthesize with different parameters

entities.name: N5 knowledge base
entities.context: Knowledge system that stores GTM hypotheses, product hypotheses, strategic decisions, and facts

entities.name: GTM hypotheses
entities.context: Go-to-market hypotheses stored in Knowledge/ directory, used for relating insights

entities.name: Product hypotheses
entities.context: Product-related hypotheses stored in knowledge base

entities.name: Strategic decisions
entities.context: Recent strategic decisions stored in knowledge base for context

entities.name: Staged knowledge updates
entities.context: Pending updates generated by synthesis, stored in N5/sessions/strategic-partner/pending-updates/ for review

entities.name: Strategic partner session
entities.context: Session type that triggers reflection synthesis

relationships.context: Automatically loads relevant context from N5 knowledge base (read-only)
Relates insights to existing GTM hypotheses
Relates insights to existing product hypotheses
Each synthesis generates staged knowledge updates based on insights
Sessions trigger synthesis generation via --session-id parameter
